_comment: Per-million-token prices in USD. Verified against docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/pricing on 2026-05-28. Note: Opus 4.5+ dropped to $5/$25 from the legacy $15/$75 — make sure your harness numbers reflect this.

_modifiers.batch_api: 50% off both input and output — use for non-realtime workloads
_modifiers.cache_read: 0.1x base input price — use for repeated context (system prompts, doc corpora)
_modifiers.data_residency_us: 1.1x multiplier on all rates if inference_geo='us'
